text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What? My hobbies?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro McQueen and I are returning to the
academy after a day out, I happen to bring up the
subject of hobbies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that a bit rude? Asking a lady to reveal her
secrets?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Since you've chosen to cross this line, I suppose it
only proves your genuine interest in the matter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well, then. I will share with you, if just a
little. Now, come with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She brings me along to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Here we are. This isn't publicly known, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I... enjoy cinema.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen likes movies? Seems a little
ordinary considering the family she comes from.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But seeing as we've come all this way to the
movie theater, it would be a shame to simply
return to the academy now.
choice_data_list: Do you want to see a movie now?
Do you want to see a movie now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You mean together?! Uh, well, I wouldn't mind,
but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How does one appreciate a film with someone
else?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I... just don't know what to do. For some reason, I
feel nervous...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
S-since I can't seem to remain calm, I'll let you
take the lead. I trust you'll do well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now... which film should we watch?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What should I choose? I think the movie that will
make Mejiro McQueen happy is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Five-Hour Inferno! Now that is a film of epic proportions. Originally, it was only three and a half hours long, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The director's cut is said to have lengthened the
runtime to a total of five hours. Truly a
nightmarish film...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well then. With two of us watching it
together, the nightmare won't be so scary. Let's
go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew. I felt like we were in there all day! But, I
feel more resilient now for having watched it.
choice_data_list: Was it hard to get through?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No. After all, you were there with me to exchange
glances and laughter!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I suppose it is reassuring to have someone with me to share the experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After overcoming the five hours of hell, Mejiro
McQueen seems to have boosted her willpower!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The Great Prison Escape! It's a suspense film about a man who uses ingenuity to break out of an inescapable prison.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well. We shall watch in anticipation how the
prisoner manages to pull off this great feat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My goodness! I never imagined the main
character would escape by becoming a
fifth-dimensional being!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To be frank, the film's logic was utterly
incoherent to me, but I found it insightful all the
same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was a surprisingly intellectual movie. Mejiro
McQueen seems to have learned a lot as a result.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how she came to like movies? Feeling
curious, I decide to ask her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It was a... reactionary development. From an early
age, I had been dedicated to hobbies befitting a
Mejiro, such as flower arrangement and tea
ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But later, I found myself wanting to enjoy
something that would let me relax and destress.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Um... This is a secret between you and me, all
right?
choice_data_list: I understand. I won't tell a soul.
I understand. I won't tell a soul.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Remember, a promise is a promise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Somehow, I feel as though I've conveyed too
much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Um... I wanted to tell you. The time we spent
together today was, um... enjoyable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You are a little different from those in the Mejiro
household.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With the exception of my relatives, everyone in
the Mejiro household tends to have a line drawn
between themselves and me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
From my chauffeur to my private tutor, they're all
polite, yet somewhat reserved.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But you aren't like them. You cross over that line
without hesitation, and... I like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Normally, I don't watch movies with the helpers or
anyone I only have a work relationship with. But,
I...
choice_data_list: Wait, are you trying to say...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
N-never mind! What I said just now was a bit
odd... It must be an aftereffect from the theater.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Just... It was not a terrible experience. Maybe,
next time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, I will leave this conversation to continue at
another opportunity. Have a good night, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen leaves with a light swish of her
tail. It feels like she has opened up a little.
